rows.speaker: B
rows.english: If you accompany, I will go.

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: dehaliyinda kaagda bandre naanuu bartiini, bardiddre baralla ; hortre yaava gaadiili hoogoona ?
rows.english: If I hear from Delhi, I will join you, otherwise, I am sorry. If at all we leave which train shall we take ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: tiket sikkidre Jiitiiyalli hordoona ; sigdidre keekee ekspressalli hoogoona.
rows.english: If we get tickets let's leave by G.T., otherwise we will go by K.K. Express.

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: samyakke sariyaagi hortre erdu gantege seerutte.
rows.english: If it leaves on time, it will reach at two o' clock.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: If intimated Sundram, will come to the station.

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: niivu dudd kottre tiket tagootiini. daridra, tiket sigoode kasta.
rows.english: If you pay me, I will buy the tickets. It is a nuisance buying tickets.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: If you go to school, I will give you one.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: If Raju comes. I will go.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: If he had no fever, he would have come.
